info.name: Leafy API - Authentication & Device Management
info.description: Complete API collection for testing authentication flows and device management with User-Agent based device detection

item.name: Authentication

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

request.description: Login from web browser (Chrome on Windows). Device type will be detected as WEB from User-Agent.

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1

request.description: Login from iPhone. Device type will be detected as MOBILE.

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S918B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/112.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

request.description: Login from Android device. Device type will be detected as MOBILE.

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (iPad; CPU OS 17_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1

request.description: Login from iPad. Device type will be detected as TABLET.

header.description: For web clients, refresh token is in cookie

request.description: Refresh access token for web clients using HttpOnly cookie.

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15

request.description: Refresh access token for mobile clients. Returns both new access and refresh tokens.
Logout web client. Blacklists both access and refresh tokens.
Logout mobile client. Blacklists both tokens.

item.description: Authentication endpoints with device-aware login flows

item.name: Device Management

request.description: Get list of all registered devices for the authenticated user. Shows device type, name, platform, last used time, etc.
Remove a specific device and blacklist its refresh token.
Remove all devices except the current one. Useful for 'Sign out from all other devices' feature.

item.description: Device management endpoints for viewing and managing user devices

item.name: File Service

request.description: Upload file to S3 and create metadata record
Download file from S3 by file ID
Download file from S3 by S3 key
Generate presigned URL for file download
Create file metadata record
Update file metadata
Get file metadata by ID
Get file details by ID (includes all audit fields)
Get file metadata by S3 key
Get all files with pagination and sorting
Get all active files with pagination

variable.description: User ID who uploaded the file

request.description: Get files by uploader with pagination
Search files by filename
Delete (deactivate) file by ID
Activate file
Deactivate file
Check if S3 key exists in metadata

item.description: File Service endpoints for S3 file management and metadata operations

item.name: Testing Scenarios
Test: Login Same Device Type Twice

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

item.name: 2. Login as WEB (Second Time - Should Logout First)

header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

request.description: This should automatically logout the first WEB device and allow only one WEB device active.

item.name: 3. Get Devices - Should Show Only One WEB

exec: pm.test('Only one WEB device exists', function() {

item.name: Plant Events
item.description: Calendar-style events linked to a plant — sourced manually or from a RAG treatment plan.

body.raw:
{
  "plantId": "",
  "eventType": "DISEASE_DETECTED",
  "note": "Phát hiện Sâu đục lá cà phê",
  "description": "Quan sát thấy các đường hầm đặc trưng do ấu trùng sâu đục lá tạo ra trên lá cà phê. Mức độ lây nhiễm vừa phải.",
  "daysFromNow": 0,
  "durationDays": 1,
  "isPlanned": false,
  "calculatedStartDate": "2026-03-05",
  "calculatedEndDate": "2026-03-05",
  "phiDays": null,
  "ppeRequired": null,
  "mrlNote": null,
  "estimatedCost": null,
  "sourcePlanId": null
}

request.description: Create a single PlantEvent. Set eventType to one of: IRRIGATION, NUTRITION, WEED_CONTROL, PRUNING, SCOUTING, DISEASE_DETECTED, TREATMENT_APPLICATION, QUARANTINE, HEALTH_RECOVERY, PHENOLOGY, REPOT, HARVEST.

item.name: Bulk Create Plant Events (from RAG Plan)

body.raw:
[
  {
    "plantId": "",
    "eventType": "DISEASE_DETECTED",
    "note": "Phát hiện bệnh",
    "description": "Xác nhận mầm bệnh trên lá.",
    "daysFromNow": 0,
    "durationDays": 1,
    "isPlanned": false,
    "calculatedStartDate": "2026-03-05",
    "calculatedEndDate": "2026-03-05",
    "sourcePlanId": ""
  },
  {
    "plantId": "",
    "eventType": "TREATMENT_APPLICATION",
    "note": "Phun thuốc lần 1",
    "description": "Phun Copper Oxychloride 0.3% toàn bộ tán lá. PHI: 14 ngày.",
    "daysFromNow": 1,
    "durationDays": 1,
    "isPlanned": true,
    "calculatedStartDate": "2026-03-06",
    "calculatedEndDate": "2026-03-06",
    "phiDays": 14,
    "ppeRequired": "Mặt nạ phòng độc, găng tay chống hóa chất, ủng cao su, bảo hộ toàn thân",
    "mrlNote": "Tuân thủ MRL của EU cho Copper Oxychloride. Bắt buộc tuân thủ thời gian cách ly.",
    "estimatedCost": "150,000 VND",
    "sourcePlanId": ""
  }
]

request.description: Import an entire RAG-generated treatment plan schedule at once. All events in the array should share the same plantId and sourcePlanId.
Partially update a PlantEvent. Only provided fields are updated (null-safe).
Retrieve a single PlantEvent by its MongoDB ID.
List all events for a plant, sorted by scheduled date ascending (calendar order).

variable.description: One of: IRRIGATION, NUTRITION, WEED_CONTROL, PRUNING, SCOUTING, DISEASE_DETECTED, TREATMENT_APPLICATION, QUARANTINE, HEALTH_RECOVERY, PHENOLOGY, REPOT, HARVEST

request.description: Filter events for a plant by a specific EventType.

item.name: Get Events by Plant + Planned Status

query.description: true = scheduled future events; false = immediate/recorded events

request.description: Filter plant events by planned status. isPlanned=true returns the upcoming schedule; false returns recorded/immediate events.

item.name: Get Events by Source Plan ID

variable.description: MongoDB planId from the RAG TreatmentPlan document

request.description: Retrieve all events that were generated from a specific RAG TreatmentPlan. Useful for previewing or deleting an imported schedule.
Hard-delete a single PlantEvent by ID.
